title: Tracer Deep Hole Construction Pencil with 6 x Replacement Lead Pack and accompanying Site Holsters all-in-one Marking Kit. Carpenter Pencil Set
features: ALL-PURPOSE CONSTRUCTION PENCIL - Clear and precise marking up to 145mm and ideal for general-purpose construction marking on most common materials.
DEEP HOLE MARKING- Equipped with a 2B Lead that can be fully extended allowing for the user to mark depths of up to 145mm which is perfect for marking through small gaps and drill holes.
BUILT FOR CONSTRUCTION - With a sturdy metal design and accompanying TRACER Site Holder, the Deep Hole Construction Pencil is built specifically for the wear and tear of construction sites.
VERSATILE MARKING - The TRACER Deep Hole Construction Pencil is suitable for marking on ceramics, plastic, wood and metal work surfaces.
INBUILT SHARPENER - Keep your marking precise and accurate with an inbuilt pencil sharpener.
description: Product Description TRACER Deep Hole Construction Pencil The perfect tool for Carpenters, Joiners, Kitchen Fitters and DIY enthusiasts alike. Thanks to its unique 120mm retractable, interchangeable leads, the TRACER deep hole pencil can mark through beams & joists with ease. About the product Being able to reach depths of 100mm in a 3mm hole with the extendable and retractable lead or 145mm in a 6mm hole at standard length, the TRACER Deep Hole Construction Pencil can satisfy even working on the most awkward of jobs. The included leads provide the perfect versatility you need when writing and marking on different work surfaces such as wood, metal, tiles, plastic, and piping. With an inbuilt sharpener, site holster, and metal shaft fit for the wear and tear of any working environment, this is the only marking pencil you will ever want on your hip. New to the market in 2018, TRACER professional marking products have been specifically designed for the construction industry, offering the perfect mark for all trade professionals. Fully Extendable and Retractable The TRACER Deep Hole Construction Pencil has the ability to fully extend and retract its leads allowing the pencil to mark depths of 145mm when fully extended. This has the added bonus of allowing the pencil to mark in holes too narrow for the metal shafts of the pencil. Reliable and always to hand Coming equipped with a sturdy site holster and being made of lightweight metal, the TRACER Deep Hole Construction Pencil is sure to be a reliable part of any user's toolkit. Just tuck it into a pocket with shirt/trouser clip without fear of accidental damage. There is no need for behind-the-ear storage anymore. Replacement and Alternative Leads Accidents happen, that is why included with your TRACER Deep Hole Construction Pencil is a case carrying a set of four replacement leads for your pencil. Alongside this, your TRACER pencil comes paired with two alternative yellow leads which are perfect when working upon darker surfaces. Inbuilt Lead Sharpener The TRACER Deep Hole Construction Pencil has another hidden feature in its toolkit, the included Site Holster has an inbuilt lead sharpener in its shirt/trouser clip to keep your pencil sharp and precise. This means that your markings and measurements will be just as accurate at the end of the day as they were at the beginning of the day. Product Specification Length 147mm/158mm (Holstered) Width 18mm/25mm (Holstered) Height 14mm/16mm (Holstered) Weight 39g (Packaging) Lead thickness 2.8mm
